The question is asking to determine which time period had the least deaths per year. To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "deaths per year" column in the order of "small to large" using the f_sort_column(deaths per year) operation. This will allow us to see the time period with the least deaths per year as well as the order of deaths per year from the least to the most for each period.

The time period with the least deaths per year is the one with the lowest value in the "deaths per year" column. Comparing all the values, the lowest number is 66 000, which corresponds to the period 1950-1955.
